corrections.note: Transcript has ἰδοὺ; page reads ἰδον without final upsilon.
Transcript has κατακεκαυμένας; page reads κατακεκαυμένᾱς? Wait image shows feminine accusative plural with acute; correction is accentless? Actually transcript matches form. No correction needed.

corrections.correct: ὡς ἐν ὀρυμῷ ἢ ὡς ἐν ἐνὶ τῶν ὀρέων
corrections.note: The phrase ἐν ὀρυμῷ ἢ is omitted after ὡς.
Page reads καθηρημμένα with theta, not κατηρημμένα.
Image appears to have νόμου without accent? likely not worth correcting.
Body was altered to the apparatus variant; page body reads εἰς ὄνειδος.

corrections.current: τὸ θυσιαστήριον τῶν ὁλοκαυτωμάτων καὶ θυμιαμάτων
corrections.correct: τὸ θυσιαστήριον τῶν ὁλοκαυτωμάτων καὶ θυμιαμάτων

corrections.note: The siglum after αναβωμεν κ καθαρισωμεν is ℵVᵃ, not plain ℵV.
Dash spacing in omission note is printed as ημων - ℵV.
Apparatus lemma has omega with iota subscript.

corrections.current: τα σκευη τα αγια] σκευη αγ. ℵV
corrections.correct: τα σκευη τα αγια] σκευη τα αγια ℵV
corrections.note: Printed apparatus appears to read full phrase, not abbreviation αγ.

uncertain.note: Transcript and image both seem to read εἰς ὄνειδος; apparatus has ονειδισμον V. No body correction likely needed.
The abbreviation after σκευη may be printed αγια or αγ.; image slightly blurred.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but there is a clear omission in v.38, a misread in v.39, and σημάτων/σημαιῶν in v.40. Apparatus generally matches with minor siglum/format issues.
